title: Referral links are hardcoded to the production host
reasoning: The referral URL ignores the actual deployed origin and any environment-specific configuration. In local, preview, staging, white-label, or future domain deployments, connected users will copy a production app.escrowhubs.io link instead of the current application URL, which can misroute referrals and make non-production verification misleading.
reproduction: Run the frontend on any non-production host, connect a wallet, open the referral panel, and observe that the generated link still points to https://app.escrowhubs.io/?ref=... rather than the current origin.
recommendation: Build the base URL from a public environment variable with a current-origin fallback on the client, or otherwise use the canonical configured app URL per deployment environment.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: No linked tests are provided for this component, and there is no test asserting referral-link generation under different deployment origins or environment configuration.
suggestedRegressionTest: Render ReferralPanel with a mocked connected wallet and configured app origin, then assert the displayed/copied referral URL uses that configured origin and wallet address.
minimumFixScope: Replace the hardcoded APP_URL usage in referral-panel.tsx with deployment-aware URL construction and cover it with a focused component/unit test.
